query_title: Children of the Corn 666: Isaac's Return

recommendations.title: Travis Scott: Look Mom I Can Fly
recommendations.overview: While crafting his Grammy-nominated album "Astroworld," Travis Scott juggles controversy, fatherhood and career highs in this intimate documentary.

recommendations.title: Oh, Hi!

recommendations.title: The House at the End of Time
recommendations.overview: The story of Dulce, a mother who has encounters with apparitions inside her old house. She must decipher a mystery that could trigger a prophecy: the death of her family.

recommendations.title: The Last Son
recommendations.overview: Isaac LeMay, a murderous outlaw, learns he is cursed by a prophecy: one of his children will kill him. To prevent this, he hunts down each of his estranged children, including long-lost son Cal. With bounty hunters and Sheriff Solomon on his tail, Le

recommendations.title: Shutter
recommendations.overview: When Jane and Tun run over a girl in a car accident, they speed away immediately from the crime scene. However, Tun, a photographer, soon discovers strange shadows in his photos, which unsettles them.

recommendations.title: Loving Vincent
recommendations.overview: A young man arrives at the last hometown of painter Vincent van Gogh to deliver the troubled artist's final letter and ends up investigating his final days there.

recommendations.title: The Lost Patient
recommendations.overview: The 19 years old Thomas wakes up in a hospital after three years in a coma. He doesn't remember anything. The psychologist Anna tells him that his family has been murdered and that he is the only survivor of the massacre while his sister Laura is sti

recommendations.title: Good Bye, Lenin!
recommendations.overview: Alex Kerner's mother was in a coma while the Berlin wall fell. When she wakes up he must try to keep her from learning what happened (as she was an avid communist supporter) to avoid shocking her which could lead to another heart attack.

recommendations.title: K.O.
recommendations.overview: A CEO for a television channel finds his life torn apart after he wakes up from coma.
